title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the sm persona again produced two back-to-back failed runs with explicit truncation signatures at 2026-05-29T13:12:33.351315+00:00 and 2026-05-29T13:12:33.369822+00:00. Both errors name the failure mode directly: JSON parsing failed because the response ended with finish_reason=length at the configured max_tokens boundary. The same pattern had previously been raised, then was absent for several quiet windows, and has now recurred in a clearly diagnosable form.

The immediate impact in this window is limited because the failures were brief and recorded at zero cost, and the sm persona also had successful runs immediately before and after the failures. Even so, the pattern is factory-attributable rather than story-specific: the error text points to output truncation / response-shape mismatch rather than a domain assertion inside a single story. That makes this more actionable than the other failures in the window, which were sandbox-style "tests not green after run" events with ambiguous significance.

Possible explanations supported by the evidence are an intermittent model-output length boundary, persona output-size expectations, or dispatch handling around structured JSON responses for sm. The evidence does not support a broader factory stall: there were no tick, queue, spend, orphaned worktree, or placeholder-leak signals in the same interval, and the truncation was not sustained beyond the two adjacent failed runs seen here.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Several sandbox-style test runs failed quickly, and the sm persona hit two JSON parse failures caused by responses truncating at max_tokens with finish_reason=length.

evidence.excerpt: {"noteworthy":"Seven failed runs were seen. Four are ambiguous test-red sandbox failures, but two sm failures are clearly diagnosable truncation errors: \"json parse failed at max_tokens=65536/8192 finish_reason=length\"."}
{"noteworthy":"A retry storm is present for onboarder with 3 failures in the window; the sm persona also failed twice in quick succession with the same truncation class."}
persona=sm success=false model=deepseek/deepseek-chat error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880
persona=sm success=false model=deepseek/deepseek-chat error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" tokens_out=20
persona=sm success=true model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=822 followed the two truncation failures, indicating the issue was intermittent rather than a full stop.

escalation_reason: Recurring sm truncation pattern has reappeared across multiple watcher-note intervals, most recently with two consecutive failures at 2026-05-29T13:12:33Z explicitly citing max_tokens and finish_reason=length. L3 judgment is needed because this is a clearly diagnosable factory-side structured-output / output-cap issue that had previously been escalated, went quiet, and has now resumed.
